message:
test: add Unicode wasm patch/hash parity fixtures (bd-lff4p.2.18.5)

Add 13 targeted tests in frankenterm-web patch_feed covering the full
Cell → CellData → patch → stats → frame-hash pipeline for Unicode content:
CJK, Hangul, Katakana, Latin Extended, emoji, combining marks, ZWJ,
variation selectors, multi-row grids, and incremental diff updates.
All 44 patch_feed tests pass (31 existing + 13 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
